---
title: "Getting Started with My Thesis"
author: "Paige Kemper"
date: "2026-02-15"
categories: [research, updates]
image: "image.jpg"
---

## Beginning the Journey

Today marks the start of documenting my thesis research journey. This blog will track progress, challenges, and insights.

## Research Goals

My primary objectives are:

1. Collect and analyze data from multiple sources
2. Develop robust analytical methods
3. Contribute new insights to the field

## Initial Thoughts

Starting a thesis can be overwhelming, but having a structured approach helps...

## What's Next

- Finalize research questions
- Complete literature review
- Begin data collection

Stay tuned for updates!
